create-pdf-with-custom-title-page.title: Create PDF with Custom Title Page
create-pdf-with-custom-title-page.description: Shows how to generate a PDF document, add a title page, and customize the title text's font, size, and color using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-highres-image-into-pdf.title: Insert High-Resolution Image into PDF with Absolute Positioning
insert-highres-image-into-pdf.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF, place a high‑resolution image at specific coordinates using a rectangle, and save the updated document.

create-searchable-pdf-from-scanned-image.title: Create Searchable PDF from Scanned Images using OCR Overlay
create-searchable-pdf-from-scanned-image.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to overlay invisible OCR text on scanned PDF pages, producing a searchable PDF without altering the original images.

add-indented-paragraph-with-line-spacing.title: Add Indented Paragraph with Line Spacing to PDF
add-indented-paragraph-with-line-spacing.description: Loads an existing PDF, creates a TextParagraph with first‑line and subsequent‑line indentation, adds lines with extra line spacing, and writes the paragraph to the first page using Aspose.Pdf.

add-multi-level-toc-to-pdf.title: Add Multi‑Level Table of Contents to PDF
add-multi-level-toc-to-pdf.description: Shows how to enable auto‑tagging on an existing PDF, detect heading hierarchy, insert a dedicated TOC page, and generate a multi‑level table of contents with page numbers using Aspose.Pdf.

customize-toc-entry-formatting.title: Customize TOC Entry Formatting with Tab Leaders
customize-toc-entry-formatting.description: Demonstrates how to insert a Table of Contents page, set different TabLeaderType values for TOC levels, and hide page numbers for specific levels using Aspose.Pdf.

remove-page-from-pdf.title: Remove a Page from PDF and Renumber Remaining Pages
remove-page-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, delete a specific page, and save the document, with the remaining pages automatically renumbered.

insert-blank-cover-page-into-pdf.title: Insert Blank Cover Page into PDF
insert-blank-cover-page-into-pdf.description: Shows how to add a blank page at the beginning of an existing PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

replace-text-in-pdf-preserve-formatting.title: Replace Text in PDF While Preserving Formatting
replace-text-in-pdf-preserve-formatting.description: Shows how to locate a specific word in a PDF and replace it with another word using Aspose.Pdf, keeping the original text formatting intact.

extract-images-from-pdf-to-png.title: Extract Images from PDF and Save as PNG
extract-images-from-pdf-to-png.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through each page's image resources, and save each image as a PNG file while preserving its original resolution.

add-digital-signature-field-and-sign-pdf.title: Add Digital Signature Field and Sign PDF with Self‑Signed Certificate
add-digital-signature-field-and-sign-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a signature field on a PDF page and apply a PKCS#7 digital signature using a self‑signed PFX certificate.

validate-pdf-a1a-compliance.title: Validate PDF for PDF/A‑1A Compliance and Generate Report
validate-pdf-a1a-compliance.description: Demonstrates how to validate a PDF file against the PDF/A‑1A standard using Aspose.Pdf and save a detailed validation report.

validate-pdf-a-1b-compliance.title: Validate PDF for PDF/A-1B Compliance
validate-pdf-a-1b-compliance.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, validate it against the PDF/A‑1B standard, and write a validation log. The example also shows how to read the compliance flag and validation result.

remove-metadata-embedded-files-pdf.title: Remove Metadata and Embedded Files from PDF
remove-metadata-embedded-files-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to clear hidden metadata, delete embedded files, and optimize resources in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf to reduce file size.

set-pdf-expiration-date.title: Set PDF Expiration Date with JavaScript
set-pdf-expiration-date.description: Shows how to embed a JavaScript action in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf that automatically closes the document when the current date exceeds a specified expiration date.

flatten-pdf-form-fields.title: Flatten Interactive PDF Form Fields
flatten-pdf-form-fields.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, flatten all interactive form fields into static content, and save the resulting document.

check-pdf-incremental-updates.title: Check PDF for Incremental Updates
check-pdf-incremental-updates.description: Loads a PDF file with Aspose.Pdf and reports whether the document contains incremental updates.

monitor-pdf-conversion-progress.title: Monitor PDF Conversion Progress with Custom Progress Handler
monitor-pdf-conversion-progress.description: Demonstrates attaching a custom progress handler to a PDF-to-HTML conversion using Aspose.Pdf and reporting conversion stages via console output.

create-watermark-layer-merge-pdf-layers.title: Create Watermark Layer and Merge PDF Layers
create-watermark-layer-merge-pdf-layers.description: Demonstrates adding an image watermark as a PDF layer using Aspose.Pdf, then merging all layers into a single layer before saving the document.

add-accessibility-tags-to-pdf.title: Add Accessibility Tags (Heading, Paragraph, Table) to PDF
add-accessibility-tags-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to enable auto‑tagging, set document language and title, and add accessible heading, paragraph, and table elements using Aspose.Pdf's tagged content API.

attach-pdf-portfolio-set-description-met.title: Attach PDF Portfolio and Set Custom Description Metadata
attach-pdf-portfolio-set-description-met.description: Demonstrates embedding a PDF portfolio as an attached file, adding a visible file attachment annotation, and setting custom description metadata in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

read-update-pdf-metadata.title: Read and Update PDF Metadata
read-update-pdf-metadata.description: The example loads a PDF, displays its current Author and Title metadata, updates these fields, and saves the modified document to a new file.

apply-pdf-password-protection.title: Apply Password Protection and Permissions to a PDF
apply-pdf-password-protection.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, setting user and owner passwords, defining permissions, encrypting with AES‑256, and saving the protected file using Aspose.Pdf.

print-pdf-document-using-aspose-pdf-view.title: Print PDF Document Using Aspose.Pdf Viewer
print-pdf-document-using-aspose-pdf-view.description: Demonstrates how to send a PDF file to the default printer directly from a .NET application using Aspose.Pdf's PdfViewer class.

interrupt-resume-pdf-save.title: Interrupt and Resume Large PDF Save
interrupt-resume-pdf-save.description: Shows how to cancel an ongoing asynchronous PDF save using Aspose.Pdf's InterruptMonitor and then resume the save operation on the same document and stream.

generate-crash-report-pdf.title: Generate Crash Report PDF from Exception
generate-crash-report-pdf.description: Shows how to create an HTML crash report from a caught exception using CrashReportOptions and then convert that report to a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.

embed-zugferd-xml-into-pdf.title: Embed ZUGFeRD XML into PDF and Verify Embedding
embed-zugferd-xml-into-pdf.description: Shows how to embed a ZUGFeRD invoice XML file into an existing PDF with Aspose.Pdf, then confirm the embedded file is present before saving the result.

add-javascript-open-action-to-pdf.title: Add JavaScript Open Action to PDF
add-javascript-open-action-to-pdf.description: Shows how to embed a JavaScript alert that runs when the PDF is opened using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-multiple-html-fragments-to-pdf.title: Convert Multiple HTML Fragments to a Single PDF with Custom Options
convert-multiple-html-fragments-to-pdf.description: Shows how to combine several HTML strings, set HtmlLoadOptions, and generate a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-styled-table-with-borders-and-altern.title: Add Styled Table with Borders and Alternating Row Colors to PDF
add-styled-table-with-borders-and-altern.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF table with a full border, cell borders, padding, and alternating background colors for rows using Aspose.Pdf.

add-hyperlink-annotation-to-pdf.title: Add Hyperlink Annotation to PDF
add-hyperlink-annotation-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to insert a clickable hyperlink annotation that opens an external website into an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

replace-image-in-pdf-page.title: Replace Image in PDF Page
replace-image-in-pdf-page.description: Shows how to replace an existing image on a specific PDF page with a new image while keeping the original layout using Aspose.Pdf.

add-page-numbers-to-pdf-footer.title: Add Page Numbers to PDF Footer
add-page-numbers-to-pdf-footer.description: Demonstrates how to add dynamic page number stamps to the footer of each page in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-multiple-page-sizes.title: Create PDF with Multiple Page Sizes and Orientations
create-pdf-multiple-page-sizes.description: The example shows how to create a PDF document containing several sections, each with its own page size and orientation, using Aspose.Pdf. It demonstrates adding pages, resizing them, switching to landscape, and adding a title text to each page.

merge-two-pdfs-preserve-bookmarks.title: Merge Two PDFs While Preserving Bookmarks
merge-two-pdfs-preserve-bookmarks.description: Shows how to combine two PDF files into one using Aspose.Pdf, keeping the bookmarks from both source documents.

extract-text-from-pdf-page-range.title: Extract Text from PDF Page Range
extract-text-from-pdf-page-range.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract text from a specified range of pages using TextAbsorber, and save the result to a plain text file.

add-company-logo-header-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Company Logo Header to PDF Pages
add-company-logo-header-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF, create an ImageStamp for a logo, place it as a top‑center header on every page, and save the modified document using Aspose.Pdf.

set-pdf-creation-modification-dates-keyw.title: Set PDF Creation/Modification Dates and Keywords
set-pdf-creation-modification-dates-keyw.description: This example demonstrates how to assign creation date, modification date, and custom keyword metadata to a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-with-embedded-truetype-font.title: Create PDF with Embedded TrueType Font
create-pdf-with-embedded-truetype-font.description: Demonstrates how to embed a TrueType font (e.g., Arial) into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, ensuring consistent rendering across devices.

apply-semi-transparent-image-overlay-to-.title: Apply Semi-Transparent Image Overlay to PDF Pages
apply-semi-transparent-image-overlay-to-.description: Demonstrates how to add a semi‑transparent image stamp as a watermark to each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

clickable-table-of-contents-pdf.title: Create PDF with Clickable Table of Contents
clickable-table-of-contents-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF, add a Table of Contents page, create multiple content sections, and attach link annotations so each TOC entry jumps to its corresponding section.

remove-all-annotations-from-pdf.title: Remove All Annotations from PDF
remove-all-annotations-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages, delete every annotation on each page, and save a clean version of the document.

add-signature-field-to-pdf.title: Add a Signature Field to a PDF Document
add-signature-field-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates inserting a signature form field into an existing PDF, configuring its appearance and border, and saving the updated file using Aspose.Pdf.

encrypt-pdf-aes256-restrict-permissions.title: Encrypt PDF with AES‑256 and Restrict Printing/Copying
encrypt-pdf-aes256-restrict-permissions.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, apply AES‑256 encryption with no permissions (disabling printing and copying), and save the encrypted document.

create-pdf-portfolio.title: Create PDF Portfolio with Multiple PDFs
create-pdf-portfolio.description: Shows how to combine several PDF files into a single PDF portfolio by adding each file as a FileSpecification attachment using Aspose.Pdf.

add-custom-xml-metadata-to-pdf.title: Add Custom XML Metadata to PDF Document
add-custom-xml-metadata-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add custom key‑value pairs to a PDF's document info dictionary and embed XMP XML metadata using Aspose.Pdf.

add-custom-colored-line-annotation.title: Add Custom Colored Line Annotation to PDF
add-custom-colored-line-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to add a line annotation with a custom blue color and thickness to a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

replace-pdf-page-with-html.title: Replace PDF Page with HTML-generated Page
replace-pdf-page-with-html.description: Loads an existing PDF, converts an HTML file to a PDF page, replaces a specified page in the original PDF with the new page, and saves the result.

add-javascript-sum-calculation-to-pdf-fo.title: Add JavaScript Sum Calculation to PDF Form
add-javascript-sum-calculation-to-pdf-fo.description: Demonstrates how to create or locate two text box fields in a PDF, add a read‑only result field, and attach a JavaScript action that calculates and displays the sum of the two fields.

create-pdf-dynamic-table.title: Create PDF with Dynamic Table from DataTable
create-pdf-dynamic-table.description: Demonstrates generating a PDF document with a table whose rows are populated dynamically from a DataTable using Aspose.Pdf.

generate-zugferd-pdf-invoice.title: Generate ZUGFeRD PDF Invoice with Embedded XML
generate-zugferd-pdf-invoice.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF invoice, embedding ZUGFeRD XML data, converting the document to ZUGFeRD format, and saving the resulting PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-clickable-index.title: Create PDF with Clickable Table of Contents
create-pdf-clickable-index.description: Shows how to generate a PDF that contains a table of contents where each entry is a clickable link navigating to its respective section using Aspose.Pdf.

add-background-image-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Background Image to All PDF Pages Using a Template
add-background-image-to-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to apply a single‑page PDF template as a background image to every page of another PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-signature-field-with-image-appearanc.title: Add Signature Field with Image Appearance to Last PDF Page
add-signature-field-with-image-appearanc.description: Demonstrates how to add a signature field to the last page of a PDF and display a custom signature image as a visual stamp using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-embedded-files-from-pdf-portfoli.title: Extract Embedded Files from PDF Portfolio
extract-embedded-files-from-pdf-portfoli.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF portfolio using Aspose.Pdf, iterate over its embedded files, and save each file to a specified directory.

magazine-layout-multi-column-pdf.title: Create Magazine‑Style PDF with Multi‑Column Layout and Advertisement
magazine-layout-multi-column-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF with a two‑column magazine layout using a FloatingBox, including a headline, HTML‑formatted article, separator line, and an advertisement image.

add-readonly-text-field-with-default-val.title: Add Read‑Only Text Field with Default Value to PDF
add-readonly-text-field-with-default-val.description: Demonstrates how to add a text box field to an existing PDF, set a default value, and make it read‑only using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-with-clickable-email-link.title: Create PDF with Clickable Email Link
create-pdf-with-clickable-email-link.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF, add visible text, and attach a mailto: link annotation that opens the default mail client, with cross‑platform save handling.

add-captions-below-images-pdf.title: Add Captions Below Images in PDF
add-captions-below-images-pdf.description: The example loads a PDF, iterates through each page and its images, creates a styled text paragraph as a caption for each image, positions it near the bottom of the page, and saves the modified document.

create-pdf-toc-with-dot-leaders.title: Create PDF Table of Contents with Dot Leaders
create-pdf-toc-with-dot-leaders.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, add tagged content, create a Table of Contents element, and configure a dot‑leader format for page numbers.

add-popup-note-annotation.title: Add Popup Note Annotation to PDF
add-popup-note-annotation.description: Demonstrates how to add a sticky‑note (TextAnnotation) with an associated PopupAnnotation to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, linking them and saving the modified document.

create-pdf-header-with-current-date.title: Create PDF Header with Current Date Using JavaScript
create-pdf-header-with-current-date.description: Demonstrates adding a shared date field as a header and populating it with the current date via JavaScript when the PDF is opened.

add-digital-signature-with-timestamp.title: Add Digital Signature with Timestamp to PDF
add-digital-signature-with-timestamp.description: Loads a PDF, creates a signature field, and applies a PKCS#7 digital signature using a PFX certificate together with a trusted Time‑Stamp Authority, then saves the signed document.

create-5x7-inch-postcard-pdf.title: Create a 5x7 Inch Postcard PDF
create-5x7-inch-postcard-pdf.description: Shows how to generate a PDF with a custom 5×7‑inch page size and save it using Aspose.Pdf.

add-semi-transparent-background-to-pdf-p.title: Add Semi-Transparent Background Color to PDF Page
add-semi-transparent-background-to-pdf-p.description: Demonstrates how to fill an entire PDF page with a semi-transparent colored rectangle using Aspose.Pdf's drawing API.

insert-page-into-another-pdf.title: Insert a Page from One PDF into Another
insert-page-into-another-pdf.description: Shows how to load two PDFs with Aspose.Pdf, extract a page from the source document, insert it into a target document at a given position, and save the merged result.

create-pdf-with-dropdown-list.title: Create PDF with Dropdown List (ComboBox)
create-pdf-with-dropdown-list.description: Shows how to generate a PDF containing a form combo box populated from an array using Aspose.Pdf.

add-page-number-footer-to-pdf.title: Add Page Number Footer to PDF
add-page-number-footer-to-pdf.description: Shows how to add a centered footer displaying "Page X of Y" on each page of an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

remove-javascript-from-pdf.title: Remove JavaScript Actions from PDF
remove-javascript-from-pdf.description: Shows how to strip all JavaScript actions from a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf's PdfJavaScriptStripper and save the cleaned file.

merged-header-table-pdf.title: Create PDF with Merged Header Table
merged-header-table-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF containing a header table that visually spans all columns of a data table using Aspose.Pdf, followed by a regular three‑column data table.

add-pdf-attachment-link-annotation.title: Add Link Annotation to Open PDF Attachment
add-pdf-attachment-link-annotation.description: Shows how to create a clickable link annotation in a PDF that opens an attached PDF file when the user clicks it.

create-landscape-pdf-rotate-page.title: Create Landscape PDF by Rotating Page Orientation
create-landscape-pdf-rotate-page.description: Demonstrates how to rotate a PDF page 90 degrees with Aspose.Pdf to produce a landscape‑oriented document and add sample text.

add-checked-checkbox-form-field.title: Add Checked Checkbox Form Field to PDF
add-checked-checkbox-form-field.description: Shows how to create a PDF, add a checkbox form field, set its default state to checked, and save the file.

extract-pdf-outline-hierarchy.title: Extract PDF Outline Hierarchy and Print as Tree
extract-pdf-outline-hierarchy.description: Loads a PDF file, retrieves its outline (bookmarks) using Aspose.Pdf, and recursively prints the hierarchy as an indented tree structure.

create-pdf-table-with-rich-text.title: Create PDF Table with Rich Text Formatting
create-pdf-table-with-rich-text.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF containing a table where each cell has differently formatted text (bold, italic, underline, color, size) using Aspose.Pdf.

add-confidential-text-stamp-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Confidential Text Stamp to All PDF Pages
add-confidential-text-stamp-to-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, creating a semi‑transparent text stamp, and applying it to every page before saving the document.

add-automatic-page-numbers-to-pdf.title: Add Automatic Page Numbers to PDF
add-automatic-page-numbers-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to insert a page number stamp that updates automatically across all pages, including newly added pages, using Aspose.Pdf.

create-pdf-with-background-template.title: Create PDF with Background Template Page
create-pdf-with-background-template.description: Shows how to load a PDF page as a background stamp and apply it to multiple pages in a new document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-visible-signature-field-and-lock-pdf.title: Add Visible Signature Field and Lock PDF After Signing
add-visible-signature-field-and-lock-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a visible signature field, apply a PKCS#7 digital signature, and make the PDF read‑only after signing using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-text-from-pdf-to-utf8-file.title: Extract Text from PDF to UTF-8 File
extract-text-from-pdf-to-utf8-file.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract all textual content using a TextAbsorber, and write the result to a UTF‑8 encoded text file.

create-pdf-form-with-radio-buttons.title: Create PDF Form with Radio Button Groups
create-pdf-form-with-radio-buttons.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF containing a form with two radio button groups for multiple‑choice questions using Aspose.Pdf.

add-javascript-calculation-to-pdf-form-f.title: Add JavaScript Calculation to PDF Form Fields
add-javascript-calculation-to-pdf-form-f.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF with numeric form fields and a button that runs JavaScript to sum the values and display the total in a read‑only field.

extract-xmp-metadata-from-pdf.title: Extract XMP Metadata from PDF to XML
extract-xmp-metadata-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, retrieve its embedded XMP metadata, and save it as an XML file.

create-multi-page-table-pdf.title: Create Multi‑Page Table in PDF with Aspose.Pdf
create-multi-page-table-pdf.description: Shows how to generate a PDF containing a table that automatically breaks across multiple pages, with a repeating header row, using Aspose.Pdf.

add-horizontal-separator-line-to-pdf-pag.title: Add Horizontal Separator Line to PDF Page
add-horizontal-separator-line-to-pdf-pag.description: Demonstrates how to insert a thin horizontal line annotation as a visual separator on a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

set-pdf-page-rotation-90-degrees.title: Set PDF Page Rotation to 90 Degrees
set-pdf-page-rotation-90-degrees.description: Shows how to rotate every page of a PDF by 90° using Aspose.Pdf so the document appears in portrait orientation on landscape devices.

create-pdf-with-date-picker.title: Create PDF with Date Picker Form Field
create-pdf-with-date-picker.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF containing an interactive date picker field using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-hyperlinks-from-pdf.title: Extract Hyperlinks from PDF
extract-hyperlinks-from-pdf.description: Loads a PDF document, iterates through its pages and annotations to find link annotations, extracts the target URLs, and writes them to a plain‑text file.

load-pdf-into-document.title: Load PDF into Document Object
load-pdf-into-document.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF file into an Aspose.Pdf Document using the constructor and retrieving the page count.

remove-all-annotations-from-pdf__v2.title: Remove All Annotations from a PDF
remove-all-annotations-from-pdf__v2.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, clear every annotation on each page, and save the sanitized document.

sanitize-pdf-remove-embedded-scripts.title: Sanitize PDF by Removing Embedded Scripts
sanitize-pdf-remove-embedded-scripts.description: Demonstrates how to configure Aspose.Pdf's hidden‑data sanitizer to delete JavaScript actions and embedded files before saving a cleaned PDF document.

sanitize-pdf-remove-metadata-private-inf.title: Sanitize PDF by Removing Metadata and Private Information
sanitize-pdf-remove-metadata-private-inf.description: Demonstrates how to clear PDF metadata and private information such as search indexes using Aspose.Pdf's RemoveMetadata and optimization options, then saves the sanitized document.

convert-pdf-to-html-rasterized-pages.title: Convert PDF to HTML with Rasterized Pages
convert-pdf-to-html-rasterized-pages.description: Demonstrates how to convert a PDF document to HTML while rasterizing each page as an image using a 150 DPI resolution.

convert-pdf-pages-to-jpeg-quality-80.title: Convert PDF Pages to JPEG with Quality 80
convert-pdf-pages-to-jpeg-quality-80.description: Demonstrates how to compress images in a PDF to JPEG quality 80 using OptimizationOptions, then convert each PDF page to a JPEG image with the same quality setting.

convert-pdf-pages-to-uncompressed-jpeg.title: Convert PDF Pages to Uncompressed JPEG Images
convert-pdf-pages-to-uncompressed-jpeg.description: Shows how to render each page of a PDF as a JPEG image with maximum quality (no compression) using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-pages-to-png-images.title: Convert PDF Pages to PNG Images
convert-pdf-pages-to-png-images.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and rasterize each page into separate PNG image files using a PngDevice and specified resolution.

sanitize-pdf-selective-page-rasterizatio.title: Sanitize PDF with Hidden Data and Selective Page Rasterization
sanitize-pdf-selective-page-rasterizatio.description: Demonstrates configuring HiddenDataSanitizationOptions to enable all sanitization features, selectively rasterizing specific pages to images, and applying full sanitization to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

remove-annotations-attachments-from-pdf.title: Remove Annotations and Attachments from PDF
remove-annotations-attachments-from-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to strip all comments/annotations and embedded file attachments from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, with optional resource optimization.

sanitize-pdfs-remove-metadata.title: Sanitize PDFs by Removing Metadata and Flattening Content
sanitize-pdfs-remove-metadata.description: Loads PDF files from a folder, removes metadata, flattens forms and annotations, strips PDF/A and PDF/UA compliance, optimizes resources, and saves the cleaned PDFs to an output folder.

generate-crash-report-for-pdf-exception.title: Generate Crash Report for PDF Exception
generate-crash-report-for-pdf-exception.description: Shows how to catch an Aspose.Pdf PdfException, configure CrashReportOptions, and generate an HTML crash report file.

customize-crash-report-filename.title: Customize Crash Report File Name with CrashReportOptions
customize-crash-report-filename.description: Shows how to set a custom message and specify the HTML crash report file name using Aspose.Pdf's CrashReportOptions and GenerateCrashReport.

custom-crash-report-directory.title: Generate Crash Report to Custom Directory
custom-crash-report-directory.description: Shows how to configure Aspose.Pdf to save a crash report in a specified folder with a custom file name and verify that the report was created.

process-pdf-generate-crash-report.title: Process PDF and Generate Detailed Crash Report
process-pdf-generate-crash-report.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, adding a blank page, saving it, and using Aspose.Pdf's crash‑report feature to create detailed reports for both Aspose‑specific and unexpected errors.

create-pdf-with-level-1-heading.title: Create PDF with Level 1 Heading
create-pdf-with-level-1-heading.description: Shows how to create a new PDF document, add a level‑1 heading using Aspose.Pdf's tagged content API, and save the file.

decimal-numbering-for-pdf-headings.title: Decimal Numbering for PDF Headings
decimal-numbering-for-pdf-headings.description: Creates a PDF document with hierarchical headings and applies automatic decimal (Arabic) numbering using Aspose.Pdf's NumberingStyle. Demonstrates continuation of numbering across top‑level chapters and saves the file.

structured-headings-auto-manual-numberin.title: Create Structured Headings with Auto and Manual Numbering in PDF
structured-headings-auto-manual-numberin.description: Shows how to add multiple Heading objects with different numbering styles, using auto‑sequencing and manual prefixes, to build a hierarchical table of contents in a PDF document.

add-new-outline-bookmark-to-pdf.title: Add New Outline Bookmark to PDF
add-new-outline-bookmark-to-pdf.description: Shows how to create a top‑level outline (bookmark) in an existing PDF, link it to a specific page using a GoToAction, and save the updated document.

add-dynamic-heading-to-pdf.title: Add Dynamic Heading to PDF with Aspose.Pdf
add-dynamic-heading-to-pdf.description: Loads an existing PDF, creates a heading containing runtime data such as the current date and user name, positions it on the first page, and saves the modified document.

create-sanitize-pdf-with-headings.title: Create and Sanitize PDF with Headings
create-sanitize-pdf-with-headings.description: The code creates a PDF containing hierarchical headings with automatic numbering using Aspose.Pdf's auto‑tagging, then loads the file and sanitizes it by removing annotations while preserving the tagged heading structure.

clean-pdf-remove-hidden-data-reapply-hea.title: Clean PDF by Removing Hidden Data and Restoring Headings
clean-pdf-remove-hidden-data-reapply-hea.description: Loads a PDF, strips metadata, form fields, and unused resources, then enables auto‑tagging with heading detection before saving the cleaned document.

batch-sanitize-pdfs.title: Batch Sanitize PDFs and Remove Metadata
batch-sanitize-pdfs.description: Demonstrates how to process a folder of PDF files, remove metadata, PDF/A and PDF/UA compliance, and delete embedded attachments using Aspose.Pdf, then save the cleaned PDFs to an output directory.

sanitize-pdf-remove-hidden-data.title: Sanitize PDF by Removing Hidden Metadata and Compliance Markers
sanitize-pdf-remove-hidden-data.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, removing metadata, PDF/A and PDF/UA compliance information, optimizing resources, and saving the sanitized document.

check-hidden-annotations-pdf.title: Check for Hidden Annotations in a PDF
check-hidden-annotations-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages and annotations, and detect any annotation that has the Hidden flag set.

sanitize-pdf-hidden-data-preserve-metada.title: Sanitize PDF Hidden Data While Preserving Metadata
sanitize-pdf-hidden-data-preserve-metada.description: Demonstrates how to remove hidden content such as JavaScript, annotations, and private info from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf while keeping the document's metadata intact.

rasterize-pdf-pages-to-png-lossless.title: Rasterize PDF Pages to PNG with Lossless Compression
rasterize-pdf-pages-to-png-lossless.description: Loads a PDF, configures ImageCompressionOptions for lossless PNG (quality 100), optimizes the document, and rasterizes each page to PNG files using PngDevice.

convert-pdf-pages-to-high-resolution-tif.title: Convert PDF Pages to High-Resolution TIFF Images
convert-pdf-pages-to-high-resolution-tif.description: Demonstrates converting each page of a PDF document into a separate TIFF file with a configurable DPI using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-pdf-pages-to-images-pptx.title: Convert PDF Pages to Images in PPTX
convert-pdf-pages-to-images-pptx.description: The test loads a PDF, saves it as a PPTX with the SlidesAsImages option enabled, and verifies that an image is generated for each PDF page inside the PPTX archive.

roman-numeral-headings-pdf.title: Create PDF with Roman Numeral Headings and Validate Sequence
roman-numeral-headings-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to generate a PDF where headings are automatically numbered with uppercase Roman numerals using Aspose.Pdf, then reloads the document to verify the numbering order.

sanitize-pdf-add-heading.title: Sanitize PDF and Add Heading for Navigation
sanitize-pdf-add-heading.description: Demonstrates enabling Aspose.Pdf auto‑tagging to sanitize a PDF and then creating a top‑level heading and paragraph via the tagged‑content API, resulting in a clean, navigable document.

generate-pdf-crash-report.title: Generate PDF Crash Report with Custom Message
generate-pdf-crash-report.description: Shows how to catch a PDF processing exception, configure a custom crash report with a diagnostic message, and generate an HTML crash report using Aspose.Pdf.

generate-pdf-crash-report-to-network-sha.title: Generate PDF Crash Report to Network Share
generate-pdf-crash-report-to-network-sha.description: Demonstrates how to configure Aspose.Pdf crash‑report options to write an HTML crash report to a network share after catching an exception.

audit-pdf-sanitization-logging.title: Audit PDF Sanitization with Start/End Logging
audit-pdf-sanitization-logging.description: Demonstrates how to sanitize a PDF using Aspose.Pdf while recording the operation's start time, end time, and duration to an audit log file.
